description:
BaseRouter.transfer(address,address,address,uint256) (src/base/BaseRouter.sol#72-84) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- IWETH9(WETH9).deposit{value: value}() (src/base/BaseRouter.sol#75)
markdown:
[BaseRouter.transfer(address,address,address,uint256)](src/base/BaseRouter.sol#L72-L84) sends eth to arbitrary user
	Dangerous calls:
	- [IWETH9(WETH9).deposit{value: value}()](src/base/BaseRouter.sol#L75)

elements.name: target == address(multicallerWithSender) || target == address(0) || target == address(this) || target == address(protocolState) || target == address(routerWhitelistRegistry) || vault == target || ! routerWhitelistRegistry.isRouterWhitelisted(vault,target)

description: DAMMGnosisSafeModule._checkTargetIsValid(address,address) (src/base/DAMMGnosisSafeModule.sol#66-72) has external calls inside a loop: target == address(multicallerWithSender) || target == address(0) || target == address(this) || target == address(protocolState) || target == address(routerWhitelistRegistry) || vault == target || ! routerWhitelistRegistry.isRouterWhitelisted(vault,target) (src/base/DAMMGnosisSafeModule.sol#68-70)
markdown: [DAMMGnosisSafeModule._checkTargetIsValid(address,address)](src/base/DAMMGnosisSafeModule.sol#L66-L72) has external calls inside a loop: [target == address(multicallerWithSender) || target == address(0) || target == address(this) || target == address(protocolState) || target == address(routerWhitelistRegistry) || vault == target || ! routerWhitelistRegistry.isRouterWhitelisted(vault,target)](src/base/DAMMGnosisSafeModule.sol#L68-L70)

description: Variable BaseRouter.WETH9 (src/base/BaseRouter.sol#27) is not in mixedCase
Variable LibMulticaller.MULTICALLER_WITH_SENDER (lib/multicaller/src/LibMulticaller.sol#28) is too similar to LibMulticaller.MULTICALLER_WITH_SIGNER (lib/multicaller/src/LibMulticaller.sol#33)
LibMulticaller.MULTICALLER (lib/multicaller/src/LibMulticaller.sol#23) is never used in LibMulticaller (lib/multicaller/src/LibMulticaller.sol#19-127)
BasePausable.paused() (src/base/BasePausable.sol#24-26) has external calls inside a loop: protocolState.paused() (src/base/BasePausable.sol#25)
markdown: [BasePausable.paused()](src/base/BasePausable.sol#L24-L26) has external calls inside a loop: [protocolState.paused()](src/base/BasePausable.sol#L25)
